workload: fio randread bs=4k ioengine=psync, size 128m (single) / 32m x16 (concurrent)
note: Dory: real dory-hv guest (kernel 6.12.30-dory) mounting a virtio-fs --share of a macOS dir. OrbStack: container bind mount of the same dir. invalidate=0 keeps the guest page cache (realistic), invalidate=1 bypasses it (raw FUSE data plane). Docker Desktop not installed.

beforeFix.rootCause: attr_valid=0 + mtime_nsec=0 with FUSE_AUTO_INVAL_DATA invalidated the guest page cache on every access
